firmware.title: NothingOS 3.0(Pong-V3.0-250506-1805)
firmware.description:
What's new in this update New Feature
🔐 Introducing Privacy Space: Swipe right in the app drawer for quick and easy access to your secure zone.
🔑 You can now set a separate privacy password for both App Locker and Privacy Space.
🖼️ Introducing Nothing Gallery. The perfect blend of simplicity and elegance.
📳 Use the touch feedback toggle in Settings to disable the face unlock vibration for the lock screen.

Other Improvements
🚀 Optimised Launcher animations for seamless app launches.
📡 Stabilised cellular network connections.
📶 Enhanced WiFi and system stability.
🔔 Enhanced accessibility experience for Status Bar and Notification Centre.
🛡️ Updated to Android security patch for May.

Notes:
The device may experience temporary overheating and increased power consumption during the upgrade and will quickly return to normal after the upgrade is complete.

firmware.title: NothingOS 3.2(Pong-V3.2-250708-2227)
firmware.description:
What's new in this update New Feature
📶 Hotspot Manager: Easily manage devices connected to your hotspot.

General Improvements and Bug Fixes
🖼️ Fixed rare issue causing the Gallery to crash when opening videos.
📱 Fixed issues where the apps’ UIs sometimes displayed incorrectly in certain situations.
🛡️ Updated to Android security patch for June.
🔧 Enhanced overall system stability.

Notes:
The device may experience temporary overheating and increased power consumption during the upgrade and will quickly return to normal after the upgrade is complete.

firmware.title: NothingOS 3.2(Pong-V3.2-250828-1921)
firmware.description:
What's New in This Update New Features

📷 Preset is now available in the Camera app settings.
✅ Default gallery options for previewing photos in Camera app settings are updated.
🚶 Pedometer and Screentime Widgets now support sharing.
📱 Shared Widgets now support more sticker types.

General Improvements and Bug Fixes

🔧 Fixed tiles display errors in Quick Settings.
🗃️ Resolved the issue of failing to open PDFs in Cloned apps.
📊 Optimised the display of VoNR icon in the status bar.
⛔ Fixed the issue of failing to block connected devices in Hotspot and tethering.
🔋 Optimised battery usage when connecting watches to the phone.
🔤 Fixed Inter font display issues in Instagram, Subito and other apps.
⚙️ Enhanced system stability and improved network connection.
🛡️ Updated to the September security patch.

Notes:
The device may temporarily heat up and increase power consumption during the update and will quickly return to normal after the process is complete.

firmware.title: NothingOS 3.2(Pong-V3.2-250917-1451)
firmware.description:
What's New in This Update General Improvements and Bug Fixes

⚙️ Enhanced system stability and optimised system performance.

Notes:
The device may temporarily heat up and increase power consumption during the update and will quickly return to normal after the process is complete.

firmware.title: NothingOS 4.0(Pong-B4.0-251226-1110)
firmware.description:
What's New in This Update Visual Enhancements

🔋 Updated the battery percentage icon with the number displayed inside.
🌑 Optimised Extra dark mode for better visual adaptation to more scenarios.
🎚️ Improved the smoothness of the volume slider animation when adjusting volume via keys.
📼 Optimised sound wave and wheel animations in Recorder for a more fluid experience.

General Improvements and Bug Fixes

🔔 Setting different ringtones for dual SIMs is now supported.
🚶 Enhanced the stability of the Pedometer widgets.
📷 Improved overall Camera stability.
🎨 Optimised the stability and colour consistency of camera presets.
🟢 Optimised Pop-up view for smoother and more reliable performance.
📳 Optimised the vibration and haptic feedback across more scenarios.
💡 Optimised the response stability of Glyph Interface to notifications and incoming calls in certain scenarios.
🔒 Enhanced the stability of lock screen, AOD, and unlocking for a more fluid experience.
👥 Improved multi-user mode to prevent changes in the main user from affecting other users.
📱 Fixed display issues in the status bar, Quick Settings, and notifications for improved visual consistency.
🎧 Fixed an issue where the Battery widget did not show the AirPods icon when AirPods support was enabled.
🛜 Optimised automatic reconnection speed for saved Wi-Fi networks.
⚙️ Enhanced overall system stability and smoothness.
🌐 Updated Google Mobile Services (GMS) to the December 2025 version.
🛡️ Updated to December security patch.

Notes:
Your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. Performance will return to normal after the update is complete.

firmware.title: NothingOS 4.1(Pong-B4.1-20260414-1749)
firmware.description:
Nothing OS 4.1 Hi there. You’re now upgrading to Nothing OS 4.1, powered by Android 16. We'll be rolling out even more features for Nothing OS 4.1 in the future, so please stay tuned.
Take a look at what's included in this update:

New Features

⏲️ Introduced the lock screen clock face from Phone (3a) Community Edition, co-created with the community member Jad Zock, featuring an exclusive typeface style and unique waking-up effect.
📡 Live Updates now work across various scenes, such as the lock screen, notification panel, and Glyph Interface, tracking real-time progress from apps, like Google Maps, just at a glance.
💬 Essential Notifications settings UI has been reworked with a cleaner look and descriptions for easier use.
🫧 Notifications that are frequently interacted with may be suggested to be set as Essential Notification.

Notes:
Live Updates compatibility with apps depends on local availability and specific app integration.

General Improvements and Bug Fixes

🤳 Enhanced video call stability to prevent stuttering when using certain third-party apps.
🍃 Optimised the stability of Time-lapse mode shooting in the Camera app.
📱 Fixed some display errors in the notification panel and the status bar.
⚙️ Enhanced overall system stability and performance.
🛡️ Updated to April 2026 security patch.

Notes:
Your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. Performance will return to normal after the update is complete.

firmware.title: NothingOS 4.1(Pong-B4.1-260618-1026)
firmware.description:
What's New in This Update New Features

🪄 Lock screen customisation now supports Depth effect (Beta) and adjustable clock face sizes and alignments.
🎴 Depth effect (Beta) is now compatible with Atmosphere wallpapers.
🎧 The status bar now displays the dedicated icon of Nothing headphones when connected.

General Improvements and Bug Fixes

🌌 Improved Launcher animations for a smoother and more fluid experience.
🔐 Added a security reminder for the face unlock method.
📱 Fixed some display glitches across various cases for better consistency.
📷 Enhanced overall camera stability.
🔗 Enhanced Bluetooth connection stability.
⚙️ Enhanced overall system stability.
🛡️ Updated to June 2026 security patch.

Notes:
Your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. Performance will return to normal after the update is complete.
